item.title: Life Biosciences Anti-Aging Gene Therapy
item.description:
• Summary: Life Biosciences, a startup co-founded by David Sinclair, has raised $80 million to advance clinical testing of its anti-aging gene therapy. The therapy targets aging-related pathways, potentially involving sirtuin activation or mitochondrial restoration, to address age-associated diseases. This funding supports initial human trials evaluating safety and efficacy in modulating aging processes.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: Endpoints News
